apps.localizedDescription: TrollStore in a permasigned jailed app that can permanently install any IPA you open in it.
apps.name: TrollStore
apps.subtitle: Jailed iOS app that can install IPAs permanently with arbitary entitlements and root helpers because it trolls Apple
apps.versionDescription:
See Reddit post for installation instructions:
https://www.reddit.com/r/jailbreak/comments/x44cpj/free_release_trollstore_jailed_permasigned_app/

TrollStore Installer probably only supports arm64e at the moment, arm64 support will be looked into soon.
